mapper.select: SELECT order_id, area, representative_office, country, accounts, project, po_id FROM t_order_info WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT order_id, area, representative_office, country, accounts, project, po_id FROM t_order_info WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order_info SET area = #{r.area}, representative_office = #{r.representativeOffice}, country = #{r.country}, accounts = #{r.accounts}, project = #{r.project}, po_id = #{r.poId} WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND order_id = #{r.orderId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order_info (task_id, order_id, area, representative_office, country, accounts, project, po_id) VALUES
(#{taskId}, #{r.orderId}, #{r.area}, #{r.representativeOffice}, #{r.country}, #{r.accounts}, #{r.project}, #{r.poId})
